# Translation Progress Tracker

## 🔍 Quality Assurance Checklist

Once translations are complete, verify:

### Polish (pl)
- [ ] All strings translated (no English remaining)
- [ ] Variables preserved (`{{name}}`, `{{a}}`, `{{b}}`, etc.)
- [ ] Automotive terminology correct
- [ ] Natural, premium tone throughout
- [ ] SEO metadata within character limits
- [ ] Legal/financial terms accurate
- [ ] Test on staging environment
- [ ] Native speaker review completed

### Italian (it)
- [ ] All strings translated (no English remaining)
- [ ] Variables preserved (`{{name}}`, `{{a}}`, `{{b}}`, etc.)
- [ ] Automotive terminology correct
- [ ] Natural, premium tone throughout
- [ ] SEO metadata within character limits
- [ ] Legal/financial terms accurate
- [ ] Test on staging environment
- [ ] Native speaker review completed

### Spanish (es)
- [ ] All strings translated (no English remaining)
- [ ] Variables preserved (`{{name}}`, `{{a}}`, `{{b}}`, etc.)
- [ ] Automotive terminology correct
- [ ] Natural, premium tone throughout
- [ ] SEO metadata within character limits
- [ ] Legal/financial terms accurate
- [ ] Test on staging environment
- [ ] Native speaker review completed

---

## 🌍 Technical Verification

After translations are complete:

- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors
- [ ] Language switcher shows all 8 languages
- [ ] Routing works for `/pl/*`, `/it/*`, `/es/*`
- [ ] Hreflang tags include pl, it, es
- [ ] Canonical URLs correct for all locales
- [ ] No duplicate content SEO issues
- [ ] All pages render correctly in each language
- [ ] Forms validate in each language
- [ ] Error messages display correctly

---

## 📊 Statistics

- **Total strings in en.ts:** ~568 lines
- **Estimated translation time per language:** 12-16 hours (professional translator)
